content.title: Adding Comment
description: This feature allows comments to be added and replies to be managed on the map.
Click the Layer View panel on the right side.
In the layer dropdown, first display the layer on the map by clicking the eye icon.
Click the three-dot menu and select Comment.
Right-click anywhere on the map to add a geo-located comment and press Enter.
View all comments using the Comment Icon in the top bar, that open list of comments in right side panel.
Click on any comment under the list to zoom into comment location on the map
Add reply by typing in the space under the respective comment box and press Enter.
